facts.patron_the traveler: {"theme":"Ways, Journeys, Safe Passage","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Road‑Sense","obligation":4,"effect":"+1 die to avoid ambushes/delays; create Path Memory timer."},{"name":"Traveler's Boon","obligation":5,"effect":"Ignore one level of difficult terrain or bureaucracy; share with ally."}],"standard":[{"name":"Waymark","obligation":8,"effect":"Declare a lane as permitted/easy; allies gain improved Position."}],"high":[{"name":"Crown of Crossings","obligation":13,"effect":"Allies +1 die to movement; pursuers –1 die; finish a travel timer segment free."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Wayfarer's Luck: reroll one failed travel roll per scene.","burden":"Restless Spirit: cannot stay in one place more than a week without marking Fatigue."}}
facts.patron_oath of flame & light: {"theme":"Dawn, Vows, Protection, Smiting","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Kindle Vow","obligation":4,"effect":"Declare a vow; gain +1 die to actions fulfilling it."},{"name":"Lay on Hands","obligation":5,"effect":"Cleanse affliction, downgrade Harm, or remove Fatigue."}],"standard":[{"name":"Radiant Smite","obligation":9,"effect":"Next melee strike flares with dawnfire; +1 Effect or +1 Harm vs. oath‑breakers."}],"high":[{"name":"Covenant Blaze","obligation":13,"effect":"Halo allies; oath‑breakers suffer SB and Harm."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Oathbound Strength: +1 die when upholding vows.","burden":"Rigid Honor: must uphold vows even when disadvantageous; –1 die to flexible actions."}}
facts.patron_inaea (angel of the spider): {"theme":"Webs, Mercy, Connection, Patient Predation","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Hearth‑Thread Knot","obligation":5,"effect":"Bind two willing targets; both gain +1 die to Aid each other."},{"name":"Snaring Filament","obligation":5,"effect":"Lay an invisible snare; first hostile crossing suffers –2 dice."}],"standard":[{"name":"Strand of Inevitability","obligation":8,"effect":"Link two actors; force SB or gain +2 dice on Setup rolls."}],"high":[{"name":"Binding Knot","obligation":11,"effect":"Bind parties to a mutual oath; breaking inflicts 2 SB."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Web‑Sense: sense hidden ties (debts, rivalries) once/scene.","burden":"Empathic Overload: suffer 1 Fatigue when immersed in strong conflict."}}
facts.patron_the witness: {"theme":"Truth, Memory, Revelation","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Lingering Trace","obligation":4,"effect":"+1 die to investigate a specific trace."},{"name":"Uncomfortable Question","obligation":5,"effect":"Force truth or mark Fatigue + Guilty Tell."}],"standard":[{"name":"Immutable Record","obligation":7,"effect":"Bind an agreement; breach causes SB and Oathbreaker's Mark."}],"high":[{"name":"Final Reckoning","obligation":13,"effect":"All present must speak a hidden truth; liars suffer Harm 2."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Truth's Sight: +1 die to detect deception.","burden":"Compulsive Honesty: must correct obvious falsehoods even when tactically disadvantageous."}}
facts.patron_carrion king: {"theme":"Decay, Renewal, Patient Hunger","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Rot's Touch","obligation":4,"effect":"Cause a small object to decay (rope snaps, lock rusts)."},{"name":"Earthen Bed","obligation":5,"effect":"Rest as if a full day; clear 2 Fatigue."}],"standard":[{"name":"Carrion's Call","obligation":7,"effect":"Summon carrion insects; target suffers –1 die physical."}],"high":[{"name":"Harvest of the Dead","obligation":12,"effect":"Allies gain +2 dice and clear Fatigue; body crumbles."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Rot‑Sense: +1 die to notice decay, poison, hidden death.","burden":"Compost‑Stained: –1 die to social rolls with the fastidious."}}
facts.patron_ikasha (she who sleeps): {"theme":"Shadow, Secrets, Latent Potential, Thresholds","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Unlit Candle","obligation":6,"effect":"+1 die to Stealth/Subterfuge; declare a minor detail 'forgotten'."},{"name":"Crossroads Raven","obligation":5,"effect":"Reroll one failed navigation/pursuit roll or force enemy to lose minor action."}],"standard":[{"name":"Umbral Reservoir","obligation":8,"effect":"Clear 1 Fatigue or gain +2 dice on Stealth/Resolve."}],"high":[{"name":"Umbral Dream","obligation":14,"effect":"Shadow Form (intangible, +2 Stealth) or Hidden Path (bypass obstacle)."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Shadow's Whisper: +1 die to Deception when lying in darkness.","burden":"Truth Echoes: occasionally speak in riddles or half‑truths."}}
facts.patron_grimmir (old man of the forest): {"theme":"Primal Mystery, Seasonal Sacrifice, Nature's Will","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Blood Offering","obligation":4,"effect":"+1 die to Survival/Stealth in natural terrain; ask one yes/no question about a hidden threat."},{"name":"Speaking Roots","obligation":5,"effect":"+2 dice to Investigation/Lore about a natural place."}],"standard":[{"name":"Twisted Path","obligation":7,"effect":"Target suffers –1 die to navigation/movement."}],"high":[{"name":"Cycle's Crown","obligation":14,"effect":"Become avatar of the season; gain seasonal bonuses and command plant life."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Seasonal Sense: +1 die to predict weather and natural events.","burden":"Cyclical Mood: –1 die to actions that defy the season."}}
facts.patron_palinode (queen of encores): {"theme":"Performance, Rapture, Unfinished Art","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Hymn Against Dread","obligation":4,"effect":"Allies gain +2 dice to resist Fear."},{"name":"Single True Note","obligation":5,"effect":"+2 dice to Performance for a scene; other rolls –1 die."}],"standard":[{"name":"Hooked Chorus","obligation":7,"effect":"Target must join or suffer –1 die social."}],"high":[{"name":"Crownpiece","obligation":14,"effect":"Create a transcendent masterpiece; +2 dice to creative rolls for session."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Perfect Pitch: +1 die to Performance.","burden":"Restless Ear: distracted by any flaw; –1 die to non‑performance focus."}}
facts.npc_bandit: {"cap":1,"harm":1,"armor":"None","dice_pools":{"Melee":2,"Ranged":2},"special":"Cowardly – when outnumbered or after taking Harm, test Spirit (DV 3) or flee."}
facts.npc_guard: {"cap":2,"harm":2,"armor":"Light","dice_pools":{"Melee":4,"Athletics":4},"special":"Patrol Training – +1 die to Notice when searching an area."}
facts.npc_knight: {"cap":3,"harm":3,"armor":"Heavy","dice_pools":{"Melee":6,"Command":5},"special":"Challenge – once/scene, force an enemy to engage in melee (Resist with Spirit, DV 4). Mounted."}
facts.npc_cultist: {"cap":1,"harm":1,"armor":"None","dice_pools":{"Arcana":4,"Deception":4},"special":"Ritual Chant – when three or more act together, they may perform a Low Rite as a group action."}
facts.npc_bandit leader: {"cap":3,"harm":3,"armor":"Medium","dice_pools":{"Melee":6,"Command":5},"special":"Rally – once/scene, restore 1 Morale to a nearby bandit. Dirty Fighting – may spend 1 Boon to impose –1 die on target's next defense."}
facts.npc_lesser spirit: {"cap":1,"harm":1,"armor":"None (incorporeal – half physical Harm)","dice_pools":{"Stealth":5,"Arcana":4},"special":"Incorporeal Movement – passes through small gaps. Sunlight Sensitivity – while in direct sunlight, –1 die to all actions."}
facts.npc_greater spirit: {"cap":3,"harm":3,"armor":"Heavy (or Light + immunity)","dice_pools":{"primary":7},"special":"Elemental Aura – creatures in Close suffer 1 Fatigue per round. Immutable – immune to poison and disease."}
facts.npc_wraith: {"cap":2,"harm":2,"armor":"None (incorporeal)","dice_pools":{"Stealth":6,"Spirit+Resolve":6},"special":"Life Drain – on a successful touch attack, target marks 1 Fatigue and wraith clears 1 Fatigue."}
facts.npc_wolf: {"cap":1,"harm":2,"armor":"None","dice_pools":{"Melee":5,"Athletics":5},"special":"Pack Tactics – when two or more wolves attack the same target, each gains +1 die. Blood Scent – +2 dice to track wounded prey."}
facts.npc_dire bear: {"cap":4,"harm":4,"armor":"Medium","dice_pools":{"Melee":8,"Endurance":8},"special":"Terrifying Roar – all in Near test Resolve (DV 4) or become Shaken. Maul – on a Critical Hit, target is knocked prone and suffers +1 Harm."}
facts.spell_light: {"tags":["ILLUMINATE"],"dv":2,"effect":"Create a small sustained light (torch‑brightness) for the scene.","notes":"No backlash risk; lasts until dismissed."}
facts.spell_heal (cantrip): {"tags":["HEAL"],"dv":2,"effect":"Remove 1 Fatigue from yourself or a touched ally. Does not heal Harm.","notes":"Requires touch."}
facts.spell_shield of air: {"tags":["AIR","DEFEND"],"dv":3,"effect":"+1 die to next defense roll.","notes":"One use."}
facts.spell_flame cloak: {"tags":["FIRE","AREA","DEFEND"],"dv":4,"effect":"Enemies –1 die to approach; caster +1 to defense vs. melee.","notes":"Two actions; creates difficult terrain."}
facts.spell_teleport (self): {"tags":["AIR","FOLD"],"dv":4,"effect":"Teleport self within Near range.","notes":"Dangerous tag (+2 DV). Leaves faint afterimage."}
facts.spell_wall of stone: {"tags":["EARTH","BARRIER","FORTIFY"],"dv":4,"effect":"Summon a 10‑foot stone wall. Provides cover; obstructs movement.","notes":"Scene duration; Integrity Timer 4."}
facts.spell_heal harm (with purify): {"tags":["HEAL","PURIFY"],"dv":5,"effect":"Restore 1 level of Harm (e.g., Harm 2 → 1).","notes":"Requires two actions; surcharge +2 DV. Also neutralises poison/disease."}
facts.spell_fleet step: {"tags":["AIR","HASTE","MOVE"],"dv":3,"effect":"Double movement speed for one exchange.","notes":"Requires open area."}
facts.spell_sleep's gentle touch: {"tags":["WATER","DREAM","COMMAND"],"dv":4,"effect":"One target falls asleep (scene duration; Resist: Spirit+Resolve DV 2).","notes":"Harm wakes target. Dangerous if used in combat."}
facts.spell_storm's fury: {"tags":["AIR","STORM","AREA","FORCE"],"dv":6,"effect":"30‑foot storm cloud; lightning strikes random targets (Harm 2).","notes":"Scene duration; reduces visibility. Dangerous tag (+2 DV)."}
facts.spell_earth's tremor: {"tags":["EARTH","QUAKE","AREA"],"dv":5,"effect":"20‑foot tremor; enemies test Body+Athletics (DV 3) or fall prone.","notes":"Destabilises structures; affects all in area."}

summary: Billy, a wounded adventurer, inspects a notice board in a bustling town square and uncovers several hooks: a bounty on bandit Edward "Scab" Merrick (see Captain Voss), a missing miller’s daughter offering a silver locket, a delve into the Sunken Vault ruins with Grimly at The Weary Wolf, and a festival. He chooses a freshly posted caravan guard job from Merchant Aldo, departing at noon for Thornhold—a route recently plagued by bandits. With three hours to

conversation.content: Billy: status

Billy, you're a mess. A deep gash across your ribs weeps red, each breath a fresh sting. Your shield arm trembles, but your blade is still up, the edge slick with your own blood. You're running on fumes—one solid hit from dropping.
Billy: Head to town, find a healer

Clutching your side, you stumble down the muddy track toward the village lights. Each step jolts the wound, and the world blurs at the edges. By the time you reach the gate, your legs are rubber. A night watchman squints at you, then calls for help.

Two strong arms loop under yours, half-carrying you to a low stone house fragrant with herbs. The healer, a sharp-eyed woman with ink-stained fingers, helps you onto a clean cot.

"Lie still," she murmurs, cutting away your tunic. "You've lost a lot of blood, but you'll live—if you rest. A silver coin covers the poultice and the stitching."

*What do you do?*
Billy: sleep and heal my fatigue

You nod, eyelids already heavy. The healer works quickly, needle darting through flesh while you grit your teeth. A cool, herbal-smelling poultice presses against the wound, and she wraps it tight. The pain ebbs to a dull throb.

"Rest now," she says, dimming the lamp.

You sink into the cot, the world fading. No dreams, just the deep, black pull of exhaustion.

When you wake, pale morning light slants through the window. The gash is a neat, closed seam under fresh bandages. Your limbs feel heavy but steady. You’re still tired, but the bleeding has stopped and you can move without the room spinning.

*What do you do?*
Billy: I explore the town

You push yourself up slowly, testing your ribs. The stitches hold. The healer is across the room grinding herbs; she glances over and gives a curt nod. "Take it easy. You paid for the night, but don't go tearing those open again."

Out the door, the town stretches before you in crisp morning air. It's small but lively—cobblestone streets freshly swept, market stalls creaking open. You catch the scent of baking bread and the distant ring of a blacksmith's hammer. A tavern sign creaks in the breeze: **The Weary Wolf**. Across the square, a notice board bristles with parchments near a modest stone chapel. Townsfolk bustle past, giving your bandaged chest a wary glance.

*Where do you go? The market? The tavern? The notice board? Or somewhere else?*
Billy: I read the notice board

You cross the square, weaving through a farmer hauling turnips and a street kid chasing a stray chicken. The notice board is a weathered oak plank, layered with parchments in various states of decay. A few catch your eye:

• **WANTED — Edward "Scab" Merrick**  
*A poacher turned bandit, last seen in Elswood. 50 silver alive, 25 dead. See Captain Voss at the garrison.*

• **HELP NEEDED — Miller's Daughter Missing**  
*She vanished three nights past. No sign of struggle. Distraught father offering his grandmother's silver locket for answers. Inquire at the millhouse on the river.*

• **ADVENTURERS WANTED — The Sunken Vault**  
*Seeking stout arms and sharp minds for a delve into old ruins east of town. Danger pay. Split of treasures. Ask for Grimly at The Weary Wolf.*

• **Seasonal Festival — Two Days Hence**  
*Pumpkin carving, mead tent, and a pig chase. Sponsored by Mayor Tully. Volunteers needed for the pie-eating contest.*

A few smaller scraps flutter beneath—lost cats, firewood for sale, a scrawled warning about doppelgangers that seems mostly ignored
Billy: !roll

As you lean in to study the parchments, you catch a flicker of movement from a half-torn notice flapping at the bottom corner. Beneath it, a fresh, hastily scrawled poster is barely visible.

*Roll a d20...*  
🎲 **14**

You peel back the torn poster, revealing:

• **CARAVAN GUARDS NEEDED — URGENT**  
*Departing at noon for Thornhold. Pay is 15 silver plus meals. Bandits hit the last two wagons. Inquire at the east gate, ask for Merchant Aldo. Leave today.*

The ink is still damp, likely pinned up moments ago. A job like that could put coin in your pocket and get you out of town before anyone asks too many questions about your wound.
Unknown:
Unknown:

You stare at the damp ink. A noon departure—cutting it close. The smell of fresh bread from the market stalls drifts over, and you notice a few more townsfolk trickling into the square. The blacksmith's hammer has stopped. A church bell tolls nine times.

*What does Billy do?*
Billy: Nine? I wonder. I think that caravan job is a good gig... I get outfitted for it.

The bell echoes off the rooftops—nine clear strikes. Three hours until the caravan departs. Enough time.

You pull the notice down, tuck it into your pocket, and head toward the market square, where a handful of stalls are now fully open. The blacksmith, a burly woman with soot-streaked cheeks, is hanging newly forged horseshoes on a rack. Next to her, a weathered quarter
Billy: I approach the blacksmith I need a sword and light armor. Does she have it?

She looks up from her anvil, wiping her hands on a leather apron. Her name's **Brigga**, you recall—worked the forge here for twenty years.

"A sword and light armor?" She sizes you up, eyes lingering on the fresh bandages. "I've got a few blades ready-made. Nothing fancy, but they'll hold an edge. As for armor…" She rummages through a trunk and pulls out a padded gambeson, well-stitched but clearly worn. "This is all I have in 'light.' Belonged to a caravan guard who didn't come back. His loss, your gain. Three silver for the blade, two for the gambeson. That's a fair price."
Billy: I haggle with her over the price (I want to get each for -1 XP, 3 for the Sword, and 3 for the armor)
Billy: status
Billy: status
Billy: status
Unknown:
Billy: !status
